issues.title: Add ATmega328P seed component
issues.description: Full 28-pin profile for the Arduino MCU.
issues.observations: Profile exists at library/ATMEGA328P/profile.json with 28 pins, fully parsed.

issues.title: Add ESP32 seed component
issues.observations: Profile exists at library/ESP32_WROOM_32/profile.json with 38 pins, fully parsed.

issues.title: Add STM32F103C8T6 seed component
issues.observations: Profile exists at library/STM32F103C8/profile.json with 48 pins, fully parsed.

issues.title: Net labels on schematic
issues.description: Same-name net labels = same electrical net.
issues.observations: Net labels fully implemented in index-schematic-editor.js: _placeLabel(), label tool, same-name labels ? same net via netlist API.

issues.title: Tag / category filtering in library
issues.description: Add category tags and filter chips.
issues.observations: Added category field to all profiles. Added category filter chips in library UI.

issues.title: Import profile from JSON
issues.description: Button to import a profile.json directly.
issues.observations: Added POST /api/library/import-profile backend endpoint and ? Profile button in library header. importSingleProfile() reads the JSON file, posts to the endpoint, preserves human_corrections on overwrite, and refreshes the library list.

issues.title: AI circuit generator (Phase 4)
issues.description: Describe a circuit → AI generates full schematic.
issues.observations: Added /api/generate-circuit endpoint (ticket-based async workflow via orchestrator). Added AI Generate button and enhanced modal in frontend (component multi-select, status area, ticket polling every 3s). Removed old duplicate direct-API endpoint and stale modal. Circuit type added to _TICKET_AGENT_MAP routing to orchestrator agent.

issues.title: Power budget calculator
issues.description: Sum current draw from all placed components.

issues.title: Safety report (DRC)
issues.description: Design Rule Check — scan for floating pins, missing decoupling caps.
